name: Arta.ai
ai_strategy_summary: AI-native private wealth platform built from scratch on AI infrastructure. Three specialized AI agents (Investment Planner, Product Specialist, Research Analyst) with institutional expansion underway across Asia. Team includes PhDs from Google Research and finance veterans from Morgan Stanley and J.P. Morgan.
headline_metric: 3 specialised AI agents deployed at 5 institutional partners across Asia; ~$123M AUM / 968 HNW accounts (US entity, SEC Form ADV, March 2025)
headline_initiative: Arta AI agent suite — institutional and consumer deployment

client_personalization.headline: Investment Planner and Research Analyst AI agents for personalized wealth planning
client_personalization.detail: Arta's Investment Planner agent creates personalized investment strategies using agentic systems, RAG, and convex optimization. The Research Analyst agent provides customized market research. Both agents are deploying to institutional clients and rolling out to consumers in 2026.
evidence: Institutional clients: Bank of Singapore, Hong Leong Bank, Ethivo, Wio Invest, Income Advisory
~$123.4M AUM, 968 accounts (all HNW individuals) — Arta Finance Wealth Management LLC, SEC Form ADV, March 31, 2025 (US registered entity only; global AUM not separately disclosed)
client_personalization.jpm_implication: AI-native wealth planning at $20/month creates massive fee compression pressure for traditional private banking at the entry level.

sources.name: Arta Finance — AI private wealth launch announcement (PR Newswire)
Arta Finance — AI Advisor Sidekick expansion + institutional partnerships (PR Newswire)

advisor_productivity.headline: AI Sidekick for institutional advisors — deploying at Bank of Singapore and others
advisor_productivity.detail: Arta's Advisor Sidekick product provides AI-augmented advisory capabilities to institutional partners, enabling smaller wealth managers to deploy sophisticated AI without building in-house.
evidence: Hong Leong Bank, Ethivo, Wio Invest, Income Advisory partnerships
advisor_productivity.jpm_implication: Arta is building the AI infrastructure layer that independent advisors and regional banks will use to compete with global players.

sources.name: Arta Finance — AI Advisor Sidekick expansion + institutional partnerships (PR Newswire)

investment_portfolio.headline: Convex optimization-based portfolio construction with AI agents
investment_portfolio.detail: Arta uses convex optimization combined with ML and RAG to construct personalized portfolios through the Investment Planner agent.
evidence: Google Research and Morgan Stanley alumni team
investment_portfolio.jpm_implication: PhD-level quantitative AI from a $20/month app is a direct threat to JPM's fee justification for portfolio construction services.

sources.name: Arta Finance — AI private wealth launch announcement
